entries.gt_803a7f1e21706d: Fresh ash in the sink. The smoking room was here.
entries.gt_82cd57ad651a73: Get the children closer to the cupboard!
entries.gt_85e949705ff69c: Do not turn on the light!
entries.gt_85efaee2204690: Replace the whole seal, not pieces.
entries.gt_86e04f228ede62: Don't take the bag by the door right away. First check who's watching through the peephole.
entries.gt_87704d909449d2: I don't want to die here!
entries.gt_87da4982aef88d: Made it without teeth in my side.
entries.gt_87fd37e9e85981: I don't want to rot here!
entries.gt_88786336ea923b: Run while you still have legs!
entries.gt_8951b8eb186ae9: Zero eight nine... I didn't say it, the button did.
entries.gt_8963971926b7d6: We'll wait it out if we stay quiet.
entries.gt_8c0ff88c07404a: Smoke from the smoking room leaks through the crack. Yesterday that was baseboard.
entries.gt_8ecc9848a36ed8: Batten everything down, check the gaps!
entries.gt_9037e4563fc3b9: Hold the door with both hands!
entries.gt_90e777616cac43: The door holds if you don't slam it and brace it with a chair.
entries.gt_9393858af99b4e: Fresh nail in the jamb. The door gave way at night.
entries.gt_93bd64118b1d42: So this is where they put me today.
entries.gt_940a3416c338f2: Blood at the threshold was washed badly. Remember the room.
entries.gt_941fee70259323: Into the bag without waiting in line.
entries.gt_94b21f0dbf1b6e: Back, if you want to live!
entries.gt_952877b43a8035: Fresh plywood on the window. It was hit from inside in the night.
entries.gt_97a138afdf6869: We get out alive only if we're quiet!
entries.gt_99464be88ce57c: The restroom's been closed by the circle. Don't go there without boots.
entries.gt_99c59f927bbc92: A corner's a corner, I've seen worse.
entries.gt_9a24f1b5677562: Let's see who's been prowling here.
entries.gt_9a9f8ecda87f0d: The Rusties took off the hinges. The door's holding on one nail.
entries.gt_9afb21862135a7: Can stand still for a minute at least.
entries.gt_9bae8b6122a1c9: Slice the loaf thinner. The knife is heard far away.
entries.gt_9fa8d476115b05: Breadcrumb under the door. Someone was listening.
entries.gt_a01f8e25fdee6a: All right, made it in one piece.
entries.gt_a199289c3e4cc9: Too quiet by the elevator. We'll wait for another.
entries.gt_a19b5bbebd15e8: Can stand still for a minute at least.
entries.gt_a1baca941ccfdf: The technotoilet workers count water as holy and residents as surplus.
entries.gt_a3572e6158835b: The can isn't sweating from the heat. I saw it.
entries.gt_a3c1434816cec4: Don't stand by the wall; the fog runs low!
entries.gt_a6e19156e99cb8: Every step can be heard through the wall!
entries.gt_a7b9e6e2bdb079: To the stairs, if we survive!
entries.gt_a7e6c1d5035c03: The elevator button is sticky. Press with your sleeve.
entries.gt_a80a220bc4a5af: Legs got here, now switch the brain on.
entries.gt_a83d233d81cef9: Don't argue with the seal, step away.
entries.gt_a895a7b62dff19: If they're knocking, don't open until the board says so!
entries.gt_a8e5ca9623916a: Carry the candle low. The neighbors should see only legs.
entries.gt_a92e9cd925cf82: Don't take someone else's bread. It has a long queue.
entries.gt_a93c8192e6cbc5: Close the airlock, rag in the gap!
entries.gt_aa653ac7e8c66b: Don't stand with your back to the door!
entries.gt_ab1901e30f9099: Right, what do we have here.
entries.gt_ad29613bcf4eef: Don't laugh in the stairwell. Neighbors ask later where the ration went.
entries.gt_ae284c1753a577: Ventilation smells of soup. The kitchen's the other way.
entries.gt_b07c15c8557421: The little door creaked. That's not a pantry.
entries.gt_b18e7060d92397: It's about to break through the passage!
entries.gt_b2af28c82efcd3: I don't want to stay here!
entries.gt_b2e48f04ce8f77: Anyone with a fever - to the wall. Anyone without a coupon - also to the wall, but farther down.
entries.gt_b44c047906e988: They're going to grind us up in here!
entries.gt_b5bf0968a5ee4a: All right, we can breathe out.
entries.gt_b5c01e15a92b94: Let them think it's empty here.
entries.gt_b6385ee91acaf3: Pipe's under pressure. Back off the circuit.
entries.gt_b766c03cf0a466: Bag under your jacket. The queue has sharp eyes.
entries.gt_b7ee242a43736b: The elevator arrived quietly. I don't like elevators like that.
entries.gt_b8080b8c614a2a: Salt on the floor. Means someone waited for fog.
entries.gt_b80824cac990f4: Sand under the rug. They moved the corridor again.
entries.gt_b83e991f08ff0e: Should've dropped like that right away.
entries.gt_b83f3913d65107: Should've dropped like that right away.
entries.gt_b8683e62547c70: Ceiling didn't collapse, that's a plus.
entries.gt_ba7eb813edff6d: Window's dark, but the glass is warm. Don't touch the curtains.
entries.gt_bb023d45ef4568: We're about to get laid out!
entries.gt_bd13e802f572b8: Don't stomp, they can hear behind the door!
entries.gt_bdbeb406edac3a: If the lamp goes out, we keep sitting!
entries.gt_bdda01aa9197a6: After fog, count people, not candles: someone will come back limping or not themselves.
entries.gt_be602e2ecd15ad: The tap coughs rust. Boil the water twice.
entries.gt_be816ec9ba1f14: Shoelace came untied in a puddle. Bad place.
entries.gt_bed71a9a618886: Do not open the hermodoor until the seam has cooled.
entries.gt_bfa9ee452e04e2: If I hear a rustle, I'll kill you myself!
entries.gt_c157ff66e7f4e5: Cupboard's open a finger-width. Owner's nearby or gone.
entries.gt_c25a4481e604f6: Thermos is warm. Its owner will come back angry.
entries.gt_c2dc40349a6068: Dry. Thanks for that at least.
entries.gt_c3cfb2be550871: The cupboard smells of candle. Means they waited there.
entries.gt_c4bfe104070c80: Into the room and bolt it!
entries.gt_c4e11bebed91fe: Hide the tools. The Rusties free metal from its address.
entries.gt_c5bd90966d60f8: Got here more intact than I expected.
entries.gt_c5be063f6574ea: Don't call out loud. Thin doors love other people's names.
entries.gt_c5ce31dbaad2ce: Cement on my foot. I'm not going into the water again.
entries.gt_c6a8a099e4ff35: Press to the wall and shut up!
entries.gt_c7ebbad5994689: Seal's crumbling. Sealant will cost more than bread.
entries.gt_c83c45b5696836: A bandage isn't a trophy, press it and wait.
entries.gt_c97ceb427b21c3: The shift left chalk. Means the route is alive.
entries.gt_cb4e6b89511e31: Seems nobody's waiting in the corner.
entries.gt_cc03c1516cfad4: At least the door's in place.
entries.gt_cc79c9c96b6926: The block can't be held anymore!
entries.gt_ccd79a781ddbe3: We'll wait it out if we stay quiet.
entries.gt_ce521a58879eb4: Iodine on the handle. Someone argued with pain here recently.
entries.gt_d084c9ac3f62aa: Made it, that's a victory already.
entries.gt_d0bd5f349cba04: Someone else's boots point toes to the exit. They know more.
entries.gt_d0d78a9d0fa918: Salt in a matchbox. Means people are ready.
